title: Think Mirror Concept Introduction
summary: Drop #18 referenced the phrase 'Think mirror,' one of Q's recurring interpretive frameworks. The phrase was never consistently defined.
raw_text:
Think mirror.
Why is this important?
How do you hide the truth in plain sight?
Q

lines.fact: Q did not provide a stable operational definition for the phrase.
lines.theory: Followers interpreted it to mean reverse names, invert narratives, or expect opposites of official statements.
lines.context: Flexible interpretive systems increase the ability to match future events to ambiguous earlier statements.
lines.questions: Can a theory be falsified if contradictory evidence can always be reframed through inversion?
lines.Deltas: 2018-2025: Phrase repeatedly referenced by Q communities during political and media events.
